should_trigger: Present the approved replay-to-live pane attachment contract in the TUI.
Show input-lease acquisition and deliberate takeover for two attached clients.
Handle event gaps, daemon reboot identity, and reconnect in the terminal client.
should_not_trigger: Define pane attach transport, lifecycle semantics, and replay sequencing.
Implement PTY terminate and kill escalation in the daemon.
Review hook trust revocation for race conditions.
